description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic bowl with a rounded form and a slightly flared rim. The exterior and interior surfaces are decorated with a striking pattern of vertical blue and black lines on a white background, creating a visually dynamic, almost textile-like effect. The lines are evenly spaced and run from the rim toward the base, giving the bowl a sense of rhythm and movement. The bowl has a smooth, glossy finish, typical of glazed ceramics, and appears to be well-crafted with no visible imperfections. A small, subtle label or mark is present on one side, possibly indicating the maker or brand. The interior is clean and unadorned except for the continuation of the vertical line motif.
description: A ceramic bowl with vertical blue and black lines on a white background, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a rounded shape.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from a slightly angled side, showing the vertical line pattern and a small label on the right.
description_view_1: This view presents the bowl from the opposite side, highlighting the continuous vertical line motif without the label visible.
description_view_2: The bowl is shown from another side, emphasizing the even spacing of the blue and black lines and the clean, rounded rim.
description_view_3: This angle displays the bowl with the label more prominently visible on the left, and the pattern remains consistent.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Vertical blue and black lines evenly spaced around the exterior and interior surfaces.
